title: Eden of the East Anime Gets Stage Play
content: The Eden of the East anime is inspiring a stage play adaptation that will run in Tokyo in April-May 2027. Crunchyroll is streaming the anime, and it is also streaming the English dub . Crunchyroll describes the story: Akira Takizawa wakes up naked outside the White House with no memories.
author: ANN

title: 2026 Doraemon Film Stays at #1, The Ogre's Bride Live-Action Film Drops to #4 in Japan
content: The 2026 Doraemon film , Eiga Doraemon: Shin Nobita no Kaitei Kiganjō ( Doraemon the Movie: New Nobita and the Castle of the Undersea Devil ), stayed at #1 in its sixth weekend at the Japanese box office last weekend.
author: ANN

title: Hiro Mashima Presents New Fairy Tail Manga Miniseries for 20th Anniversary
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for Hiro Mashima announced on Tuesday that his Fairy Tail manga will receive a new manga miniseries in Kodansha 's Weekly Shōnen Magazine to celebrate the series' 20th anniversary. The manga will begin in the combined 36th and 37th issue on August 5.
author: ANN

title: North American Anime, Manga Releases, April 5-11
content: Anime Releases Print Manga Releases Digital Manga Releases Print Novel Releases Digital Novel Releases Audiobooks Video Game Releases
author: ANN

title: One Piece Remake’s New Update Suggests a Longer Wait Than Expected
content: Jump Festa 2024, which was held in December 2023, took the internet by storm after announcing a One Piece remake, titled The One Piece , by WIT Studio in collaboration with Netflix.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll’s Biggest Isekai Returns With an Exciting Surprise
content: The highly anticipated Spring 2026 anime season is finally here with an exciting lineup of some of the best anime ever. The lineup also includes the return of some major series with new seasons, including Re:Zero − Starting Life in Another World Season 4.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Shonen Jump Anime Premiered With a Disappointing Netflix Update
content: One of the most anticipated Shonen Jump anime of the year just made its premiere as part of the Spring 2026 lineup. Marriagetoxin is an acclaimed action series written by Joumyaku and illustrated by Mizuki Yoda.
author: ComicBook

title: Acclaimed Action Series Commemorates Major Milestone With a New Release
content: Bungo Stray Dogs is one of the most acclaimed supernatural action shows of all time. Studio Bones adapted the manga, written by Kafka Asagiri and illustrated by Sango Harukawa, which began serializing in 2012 in Kadokawa Shoten’s Young Ace magazine.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Magic School Anime You Should Watch Instead of That Harry Potter TV Show
content: The Harry Potter franchise is returning to screens with a new TV series adapting the original books from the very beginning with HBO Max , but thankfully there are a ton of fun anime about magical schools that you can check out instead. Warner Bros.
author: ComicBook

title: Nickelodeon’s Next Nicktoons Crossover is Its Most Bizarre Yet
content: Nickelodeon has long made a name for itself thanks to its original programming focused on younger audiences, with the NickToons in particular making a big name for the cable network.
author: ComicBook
